description_long: This adult pedestrian is depicted as a male figure dressed in sporty, urban attire. He wears a sleeveless athletic jersey with the word 'REFEREE' and the number '3' on the front, and the number '3' reversed on the back, paired with fitted jogger-style pants. Accessories include a backward baseball cap, sunglasses, a full beard, and a prominent arm sleeve on his left arm, as well as a wristband on his right wrist. His footwear consists of modern athletic sneakers, and he has a muscular build with visible arm definition. The overall appearance suggests a casual, athletic, and streetwise character, likely suited for urban or recreational environments. The figure's stance is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and feet shoulder-width apart.
description: A sporty adult male in an athletic jersey, jogger pants, and sneakers, accessorized with a cap, sunglasses, and arm sleeve, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jersey's 'REFEREE' text, number '3', sunglasses, beard, and both arm accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm sleeve, wristband, and profile of the cap and beard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reversed number '3' on the jersey, back of the cap, and both arm accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm sleeve, wristband, and profile of the cap and beard from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic jersey, jogger pants, arm sleeve, wristband, baseball cap, sunglasses
attribute_hairstyle: full beard, hair covered by cap
